'PM Modi supervised NEET paper leak': Rahul's big charge as Centre gears up for retest
description: Rahul Gandhi sharply criticized Prime Minister Modi over the NEET UG paper leak, accusing him of personally supervising the exam's integrity. This follows the Centre's assurance to the Supreme Court about the upcoming re-examination. The apex court expressed concern for students, while the NTA detailed extensive security reforms and new safeguards implemented to prevent future irregularities.

description: Amitabh Bachchan praised 15-year-old cricketer Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after Rajasthan Royals' IPL exit, saying he couldn't even play gulli danda at that age. Vaibhav scored 96 runs off 47 balls but was heartbroken after the loss. Fans across social media showered him with immense love and support.

'India preparing for Operation Sindoor 2.0': Army chief Upendra Dwivedi
description: India is preparing for 'Operation Sindoor 2.0' as Army chief Upendra Dwivedi stated the military posture in response to Pakistan's actions remains in place. The operation, a continuation of last year's retaliatory response to terrorism, involves enhancing synergy among all three services for future warfare. The focus is on cautious deployment and troop protection in border areas.

Is Indus Treaty deadlock hurting Pak? Karachi reels under chronic water shortage
description: Karachi faces a severe water crisis during peak summer, coinciding with Eid-ul-Adha. Jamaat-e-Islami Pakistan chief Hafiz Naeem ur Rehman has accused the ruling PPP of gross mismanagement and failure to address the city's chronic water shortages despite 18 years in power.  Nearly 70% of the city is reportedly experiencing extended supply disruptions, forcing residents to buy expensive private tankers.

Microsoft CEO's Copilot ‘confusion fix’ that left employees laughing in townhall
description: Microsoft is reportedly developing a 'super app' to consolidate its confusing array of Copilot AI tools. This unified platform aims to end customer frustration by offering a single destination for various AI assistants, including coding, chat, and collaboration features. The app, expected by summer's end, will allow seamless switching between personal and work accounts, simplifying Microsoft's AI ecosystem.

Matt Walsh Slams Erika Kirk Boyfriend Rumors as Blake Wynn Breaks Silence
description: Matt Walsh criticized an X user for spreading claims that Erika Kirk was dating Blake Wynn. The rumor originated from Project Constitution, which alleged the two were seen together at a Beverly Hills hotel. Erika Kirk strongly denied the accusation, saying she was in Arizona with her family. Blake Wynn also rejected the rumor and said they are not dating.

title: Scientists develop 'smart paint' that reflects 97% of sunlight and could reduce AC use during heatwaves
Tanishaa Mukerji opens up about ‘trauma bonding’ with Armaan Kohli on Bigg Boss
Gujarat man sentenced to 10 years in prison without parole in minor trafficking case
description: A Nebraska hotel theft complaint unraveled a child trafficking ring involving Gujarati-origin operators. Kavankumar Patel received a 10-year sentence for sex trafficking minors. Investigations revealed hidden cameras and exploitation of victims, with Falguni Choudhary allegedly watching forced sex acts. Authorities continue to pursue traffickers.

title: 2 wives, domestic abuse, deadly plot: Chilling details in ex-Congress sarpanch's family murder
description: A shocking quadruple murder has rocked Ajmer, with police confirming the deaths of a former sarpanch and three family members were not accidental but a planned act. Investigators allege the man's first wife and their two children are responsible, stemming from alleged domestic abuse following his second marriage. The victims' charred bodies were found in a burnt SUV.

title: Why 8 in 10 patients turn to internet after doctor visits
description: A recent survey reveals a significant "patient confusion crisis" in Delhi-NCR, with nearly 80% of patients seeking online clarification post-doctor visits. Many feel rushed, lack guidance on next steps, and struggle to navigate hospitals, leading to increased costs and stress. Experts highlight overcrowded OPDs and weak guidance systems as key issues.

title: How English-to-Hindi shift in many govt schools has Delhi parents, kids in a fix
description: Students in Delhi government schools are struggling as English-medium classes in Class XI are being discontinued. This forces them to choose between Hindi-medium or changing schools. Parents and teachers report negative impacts on academic performance and confidence. Education activists are calling for an inquiry into the matter to protect students' futures and ensure equal opportunities.

title: 'Amazon would collapse if run like New York City': Jeff Bezos takes swipe Mamdani
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has endorsed New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's new government efficiency initiative, COGE. This comes after their public disagreement on taxing the wealthy. Bezos, who previously criticized city spending, now supports Mamdani's plan to make government work smarter, suggesting savings could benefit lower earners.

title: Google CEO admits company trailing behind Anthropic, OpenAI in AI coding agents
description: Google's CEO Sundar Pichai acknowledges a current lag in AI coding agents. He states competitors like Anthropic lead in complex developer tasks. Pichai expresses strong confidence that internal data and new model iterations will rapidly bridge this gap. Google is actively working to regain its position at the forefront of this crucial technology.

title: Inside Rod Brind’Amour and Amy Biedenbach’s Enduring Love Story Beyond the NHL
description: As Rod Brind’Amour guides the Carolina Hurricanes through another strong NHL season. And fans are curious about the woman beside him, Amy Biedenbach, his wife since 2010, who plays a powerful yet quiet role in his journey; their bond reflects not only enduring love but shared values and community-driven goals that keep them deeply connected.
